meta.title: Ankle & Foot — Diagnosis and Treatment | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
meta.description: Sprains, chronic instability and Achilles tendon injuries — ankle and foot diagnosis and treatment by Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko, orthopedic specialist with 37 years of experience. Maccabi clinics.

injuries.metaTitle: Ankle & Foot Injuries — Sprains & Achilles | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
injuries.metaDescription: Ankle sprains, chronic instability and Achilles tendon problems — how to recognize each injury, what the right treatment is and when to see an ankle and foot specialist.

injections.metaTitle: Ankle & Foot Injections | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
injections.metaDescription: Ankle and foot injections: when they are appropriate, which types exist — steroids, hyaluronic acid and PRP — and what the treatment actually looks like.

surgery.metaTitle: Ankle Surgery — Arthroscopy & Stabilization | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
surgery.metaDescription: Ankle surgery: minimally invasive arthroscopy and stabilization procedures for chronic instability. When to operate, how it is done and what to expect in recovery.

rehabilitation.metaTitle: Rehabilitation After Ankle Surgery | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
rehabilitation.metaDescription: Rehabilitation after ankle surgery: the recovery phases, gradual weight-bearing progression and the safe path back to full activity and sport.

physiotherapy.metaTitle: Ankle & Foot Physiotherapy | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
physiotherapy.metaDescription: Ankle physiotherapy: balance and proprioception training, targeted strengthening and prevention of repeat sprains — the treatment that restores ankle stability.
